text.title: LinkedIn Founder Post Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: gather one specific event before drafting; skip if none available this week

branch.when: positioning_defined == true AND lived_evidence_available == true AND hook_type == 'multi'

conclusion.verdict: pick the single strongest hook; split remaining hooks into future posts

branch.when: positioning_defined == true AND lived_evidence_available == true AND hook_type == 'single'

conclusion.verdict: draft 180-220 words; trim or expand to band; ship via Buffer / LinkedIn-native

example.trace: positioning_defined == true AND lived_evidence_available == true AND hook_type == 'single' → conclusion ref="word-band" verdict="draft 180-220 words; trim or expand to band; ship via Buffer / LinkedIn-native"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
